chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-180 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of M.A.No.1092/2017 (C/A). ------ 09.03.2022 Mr. Ashique Hussain Abbasi, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ Record demonstrates that compliance report in respect of the order dated 26.01.2017 is already on record and the petitioner/applicant’s counsel has articulated no cavil in such regard. In view hereof it is apparent that this application has served its purpose and is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
